data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commit ba6bfafa230e is HEAD of main, (2) all 11 files changed match the implementation plan (schemas, settings, UI, scripts, docs, tests), (3) legacy value normalization (actions→basic, pools→advanced) is in place at settings-load boundary, (4) CI green — both CI and Coverage Badge workflows passed on ba6bfafa230e, (5) no invariants defined, (6) no regressions detected.
